name: China Everbright Bank Company Limited
summary: China Everbright Bank Company Limited provides commercial banking products and services to corporate and retail clients in Mainland China, Hong Kong, Seoul, Sydney, and Luxembourg. It operates through Corporate Banking, Retail Banking, Financial Market Business, and Others segments. The company offers personal financial services, including personal saving deposits comprising RMB deposits, foreign currency deposits, and evidence treasury bonds; private personal loan credit products consisting of auto loans, personal project loans, personal employment enterprise loans, personal loans pledged by valuable documents, housing mortgage loans, personal commercial housing mortgage loans, personal consumer loans, and small business owner loans; personal wealth management services; payroll management, money transfer, financing abroad, and other services; and credit and debit cards. It also provides corporate financial services, which include trade financing, working capital, fixed asset, project financing, and syndicated loans, short term loans, and entrusted loan; RMB settlement and related services; international settlement services; factoring, remittance, and letters of guarantee; and inter-bank money market transactions, repurchase transactions, and inter-bank investments, as well as debt securities, derivatives, and foreign currency, as well as issuance of debts. In addition, the company engages in trust, insurance, and fund business. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 1,296 branches and outlets covering 149 economic center cities across the country. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
